allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S 192.168.1.250 -U sa -P 'sys.123' -d CoralReef_Loj -Q "SELECT TOP 10 * FROM Items")
Bash(sqlcmd -S 192.168.1.250 -U sa -P 'sys.123' -d CoralReef_Loj -Q "SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME=''Items'' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION")
Bash(sqlcmd -S 192.168.1.250 -U sa -P 'sys.123' -d CoralReef_Loj -Q "SELECT TOP 10 OID, Code, Name, Name2, Active, CardType, BARCODE, SpecialCode, SpecialCode2, CreatedOn FROM Items" -W)
Bash(sqlcmd -S 192.168.1.250 -U sa -P 'sys.123' -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.databases WHERE name LIKE ''%023%'' OR name LIKE ''%LG%'' OR name LIKE ''%LOGO%''" -W)
